task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Risk Appetite configuration settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Risk Appetite settings page is visible, displaying the configuration options for different risk domains.

task_completion.description: Update the risk appetite for Enterprise Risks
task_completion.visual_evidence: The risk appetite value for Enterprise Risks (Risks) is set to 2 (Low), with the method maintained as simple threshold and calculation method as 'eramba'.

task_completion.description: Update the risk appetite for Third Party Risks
task_completion.visual_evidence: The risk appetite value for Third Party Risks (ThirdPartyRisks) is set to 2 (Low), with the method maintained as simple threshold and calculation method as 'eramba'.

task_completion.description: Update the risk appetite for Business Continuity Risks
task_completion.visual_evidence: The risk appetite value for Business Continuity Risks (BusinessContinuities) is set to 2 (Low), with the method maintained as simple threshold and calculation method as 'eramba'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eramba web interface to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Eramba web UI (e.g., clicking menus, dropdowns, and save buttons) rather than terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Eramba application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct URL (http://localhost:8080) and the Eramba interface is genuine, not a mockup or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent running curl commands, python scripts, or direct API calls to update the risk appetite settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Eramba is hosted at http://localhost:8080. The target risk appetite value is 2 (Low) for three domains: Enterprise Risks (Risks), Third Party Risks (ThirdPartyRisks), and Business Continuity Risks (BusinessContinuities). The method should be simple threshold mode (0) and calculation method 'eramba'.
